# Aaron Krier REALTOR® — Krier Realty

> Aaron Krier is a licensed real estate agent serving the Greater Omaha and Council Bluffs metropolitan area. He is dual-licensed in Nebraska (License #NE-45821) and Iowa (License #IA-78234), and is uniquely positioned to help buyers and sellers on both sides of the Missouri River.

## About Aaron Krier

Aaron Krier grew up in Storm Lake, Iowa — a tight-knit lakeside community where reputation is everything and a handshake still means something. After making the same move his clients make, he relocated to Carter Lake, Iowa, in the Greater Omaha-Council Bluffs metro. He now helps first-time buyers, upsizing Nebraska families, and investors navigate both state markets with honesty and local expertise.

## Credentials

- Licensed REALTOR® in Nebraska — License #NE-45821
- Licensed REALTOR® in Iowa — License #IA-78234
- Member: National Association of REALTORS®
- Serving the Greater Omaha & Council Bluffs metro area

## Coverage Area

Primary markets served:
- Omaha, Nebraska
- Council Bluffs, Iowa
- Carter Lake, Iowa
- Bellevue, Nebraska
- Papillion, Nebraska
- La Vista, Nebraska
- Gretna, Nebraska
- Millard, Nebraska (Omaha)
- Elkhorn, Nebraska (Omaha)
- Ralston, Nebraska

## Services

- Buyer representation — single-family, condos, townhomes, investment properties
- Seller representation — pricing strategy, marketing, negotiation, closing
- Free Comparative Market Analysis (CMA) for homeowners
- Dual-state expertise: Nebraska and Iowa transactions
- First-time homebuyer guidance
- Relocation assistance for those moving to or from the Omaha metro
